title: The Catwalks
description: The best catwalks mod for fabrics and structures
body:
![head_0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e900304b1f3c873b62ff03e1e1c8c4a29ae7f040.png)
![head_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c081d35010ee75994917baed2295e5e7826235_0.webp)

### 📙 About the mod:

The Catwalks mod will allow you to build industrial style walkways complete with stairs, pillars, railings, etc. The mod is perfect for the setting of factories, old or military structures, and you can connect them infinitely in any direction.

The version for the Fabric modloader is under development, as well as the version for other modloaders planned for the future. The mod is also planned to be released for Minecraft versions 1.12.2 to 1.20.1 at first.

The mod is still in an early development version and may contain errors or bugs. I strongly urge you to notify me of problems from the comments section (CurseForge) or notify me via Twitter.
